notes: Hard case per ontology: Event + Organization + Place linked. Address intentionally left generic until verified from a primary source.

@graph.name: Kinderhook Farmers' Market
@graph.description: Seasonal community farmers' market in the Village of Kinderhook. Saturdays, May through October.
@graph.kh:affectiveRegister: The weekly rhythm that tells the village it is summer. Small, volunteer-run, unhurried.

kh:localNotes.note: Entry created. Season dates reflect typical pattern; verify against current KBPA announcement before the opening Saturday.

@graph.name: Kinderhook Business & Professional Association
@graph.description: Volunteer association of businesses and residents that organises civic activities in the Village of Kinderhook, including the farmers' market.

@graph.name: Village Green
@graph.description: The central public green in the Village of Kinderhook. Host site for the farmers' market and other community gatherings.
@graph.kh:functionalProximity: The centre. Everything in the village is measured from here.
